title: Urgent Opening Teacher at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions:
IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IL&FS Skills Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
